mapper.select:
SELECT d.id AS doctorId, d.name, dept.name AS department, t.name AS title, t.sort_order AS titleWeight, da.specialty, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM schedule s WHERE s.doctor_id = d.id AND s.schedule_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND s.remaining_count > 0 AND s.status = 1 ) AS hasAvailableSlot FROM doctor d INNER JOIN doctor_audit da ON d.id = da.doctor_id LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN title t ON d.title_id = t.id WHERE d.status = 1 AND da.audit_status = 1
AND dept.name = #{department}
AND (d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR da.specialty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY t.sort_order DESC, d.created_at DESC
